title: Christmas Wreath Blue Pine Cone Front Door Wreath with Gold Fern Leaf & Bauble Decorations Indoor/Outdoor Xmas Winter Wreath 13"
seller_info_text: Dibor - French Style Accessories for the Home
features: A contemporary take on the traditional Christmas wreath made from natural dried pine cones with a blue dyed finish arranged around a lightweight but sturdy polystyrene base
Beautifully adorned with eye catching golden baubles, faux fern leaves with gold accented details and blue fabric leaves creating an eye catching display for the door or wall this holiday season
Wreath measures H34 x W34 x D8cm / 13" and can easily be affixed to the door either through the centre of the wreath or via the sturdy jute hanging string at the top of the wreath
Complete with a plastic free reinforced mailing box to protect the item during transit that can also be used as a storage box for the wreath when not in use year after year
Merging traditional and contemporary style, this Christmas door wreath is perfect for a wide array of interior style whatever your sense of taste while adding a splash of unique colour to your space
description: Transform your home this festive season with the enchanting blue pine cone Christmas wreath with gold fern leaf & bauble decorations. Perfect for both Indoor and Outdoor use, this stunning 13" winter wreath is designed to elevate your holiday décor, making it a must-have for all your outdoor Christmas decorations. Brilliantly crafted with natural blue pine cones, gold fern leaves, and shimmering bauble decorations, this wreath radiates elegance and holiday cheer right at your front door. Imagine welcoming guests into your home with a beautiful Christmas wreath adorning your entranceway. This meticulously designed front door decoration has been thoughtfully created to enhance any exterior or interior space. Whether hung on your main door as part of our Christmas wreaths for front doors collection or showcased in living areas filled with festive spirit, this versatile piece serves beautifully as a centre point of all outside Christmas decorations. Decorate not just for the holidays but make an inspiring seasonal statement with every glance at your doorway; let our wreath set the tone for joyous celebrations and memorable moments.
